title: evota affinis
intro: Evota affinis, also known as the Evodia fruit or Wu Zhu Yu, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It is native to Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve pain. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, Evota affinis is prepared as a tea or used in herbal remedies, such as capsules or tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties.
